description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several palm trees and green lawns. The structure features a modern, open-plan layout with multiple rooms, including visible bedrooms, living spaces, and a kitchen area. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed along the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is flat and appears to be constructed with a combination of concrete and wood, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a spacious driveway and paved areas for parking, as well as outdoor seating and garden zones. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by a wooden fence. The design features open living spaces, a driveway, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the side, highlighting the driveway, fenced perimeter, and a row of palm trees along the boundary.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the bungalow, showcasing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear side, revealing a private garden area, additional fencing, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite end of the driveway, emphasizing the outdoor seating area and the open-plan layout visible through the windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
